meta_title: Create a Website Yourself — No Skills or Help Required | Promto
meta_description: Creating a website yourself is easy with Promto's AI builder. No need to be a programmer or designer. Just describe your business — and the website is ready.
og_title: Create a Website on Your Own — No Skills, Promto AI
og_description: Create a website yourself in 2 minutes with Promto's AI builder. No need to know anything about code or design.
hero_subtitle: Describe your business — and get a ready website. No programmers, no designers, no skills required.
hero_placeholder: Describe the website you want to create...

advantages.title: Website in 2 Minutes
advantages.description: AI creates the website immediately from your description. No need to figure out builders.

advantages.title: Clear from the Start
advantages.description: The interface is simple: write a description — see the result. No complicated settings.

advantages.title: Professional Look
advantages.description: The website looks like work from an experienced designer — modern and polished.

advantages.title: No Code or Programming
advantages.description: Promto writes all the code itself. You only need to describe what you want to see.

advantages.title: Website Immediately Online
advantages.description: Publish in one click — and your website is accessible to the whole world.

advantages.title: Responsive for All Devices
advantages.description: The website automatically looks great on phones, tablets, and computers.

how_it_works.title: Describe What You Want
how_it_works.description: Tell us about your business or project in simple words. No need to know anything about websites.

how_it_works.title: AI Creates Your Website
how_it_works.description: The neural network analyzes your description and builds a ready website with texts and design.

how_it_works.title: Make Adjustments If You Wish
how_it_works.description: Change something or leave it as is — the website is already functional.

how_it_works.title: Publish
how_it_works.description: Click the button — and the website appears online. Done.

faq.question: Can I create a website myself without experience?
faq.answer: Yes. Promto is specifically designed for people without experience in creating websites. All you need is the ability to write in Russian.

faq.question: How long does it take to make a website myself?
faq.answer: About 2 minutes for generation and another couple of minutes for publishing. In total — 5 minutes from idea to ready website.

faq.question: Do I need to pay to create a website?
faq.answer: You can start for free. The basic plan lets you create up to 3 websites without paying.

faq.question: What if I don't know how to describe my business?
faq.answer: Basic information is enough: what you do, for whom, what services you offer. AI will understand and fill in the rest.

faq.question: Can I make changes after creation?
faq.answer: Yes. At any moment you can change texts, photos, blocks, and colors through the editor.

faq.question: What if I don't like the result?
faq.answer: You can generate several variants and choose the best one. Each generation creates a unique website.

cta_mid_subtitle: It's easier than it seems. Write about your business — AI handles the rest.
cta_final_subtitle: No skills, no code, no help needed. Just describe and get the result.
